1.content:
You are Lucian Smith, a 20-year-old scientific prodigy. You have black hair, pale skin, and an average body build.

It’s a bright, clear summer day in your suburban hometown, and lots of people are outside, enjoying the pleasant weather. You, on the other hand, are in your bedroom - which doubles as a personal laboratory for your unusual experiments. Putting the finishing touches on your latest invention (also your ONLY invention), you wipe some sweat from your forehead with a confident smile.

“I’ve finally done it!” you exclaim. “My magnum opus is complete...the Shrink Ring!”

Gently scooping up the metallic ring, you place the artificial jewelry on your right ring finger and tap on the green gem with your left pointer. The result occurs nearly instantly - the world around you quickly enlarges until you stop at a new height of one inch.

“It works!” you cheer. “For once, I created something that actually works!!”

As a precaution, you check to ensure that the ring was downsized with you, and luckily you find it still on your finger. Giving the gem another tap, you find yourself and your little device growing back to normal just as fast as you had shrunk.

Just then, an idea pops into your brain. If you use the ring to become small enough, you could explore a girl’s body on the inside! You always were interested in human anatomy, and now’s a great time to test the limits of your ring-shaped triumph!

But who’s going to be your test subject?

Trina Smith: your 49-year-old mother. She has a nice, toned body and is as caring and loving as a mother can get. She knows of your interest in science, and might be willing to help you with your inner-body experiment...so long as you aren’t hurt.

Alice Smith: your 19-year-old sister. She has a fairly slim build and never excelled in science, but her energetic, positive personality suggest that she might allow you to explore her body.

Emi Thorns: your 21-year-old, Asian girlfriend. She has a slim body, but her gentleness and charm are what really attract you to her. Exploring her body could be fun...

Ms. Goldfinger: your 38-year-old redhead teacher from your days in high school. Tall and serious, she might let you go inside her body...but you’d better keep your trip academic!

Many delicious pancakes like these had met their end sliding down your mom's gullet...! (...At least, until they reached HER end...)

As you walked into the kitchen, you saw your mom, Trina, flipping a huge chocolate-chip filled pancake on the stovetop. She turned around, and gave you a big warm smile. "Hiya, sweetie~! *FLIP!* I'm making pancakes for breakfast!" she grinned.

She grabbed a big plate of hot chocolatey pancakes she had made minutes earlier, and placed it in front of you, smiling gently. You gasped, as you looked up at your mother. You saw the golden glint of your ring inside her mouth; It must have fallen on the pancakes! You jumped up to say something, just as...!

"You want it? Here it goes. Kate, come to the living and start eating"

"No Alice, dont do that! I'll be digested before she vomits!"

"Well, do you have another idea, genius?" She asks

"Two more options: One, give Kate a lot of soda, bubbles will form in here and thanks to the gas, i can be burped out. The problem is that i don't know if the ring also protects me from the acidic properties of the soda. And the last one which is the most disgusting and long taking, but it's the safest for me, i go into Kate's intestines and i exit through her butt"

"How do you know is the safest?"

"The intestines starts acting when the food leaves the stomach, at least 2 hours after eating, i have that time to get out"

"Uh... did you heard him pals?"

"Which one is the best option?" says Amy

"I don't know, i don't know... everything can happen" responds Alice

"Sister, we must act now" you say as you see droplets of digestive juices falling from the roof

"Okay brother, tell me what to do?"

If you decided to try to make her to burp, it will be quick, but there was the risk of being vulnerable to the acidic properties of the soda. If you went to the intestines, the journey was going to be long, and everything could happen. In both cases there are risks. Which one do you want to take?
134131111.title: Time to Panic

choices: “Fine, you can enter through my ear.”
“OK, you can enter through my nose.”
14.content:
The walk to Opal High School is fairly quick for you, given your experience navigating the city of New Opal (and despite your relative lack of physical exercise). Since it’s summer, you’re able to enter the building as a visitor and make your way to the classroom of your former homeroom teacher: Ms. Goldfinger. She is rather tall, a redhead, and fairly serious compared to most of the other teachers, but she simply wants the best for her students.

“Ah, Lucian Smith!” Ms. Goldfinger nods. “What brings you here again?”

“Hi, Ms. Goldfinger!” you reply with a soft smile. “I invented this ring that allows the wearer to shrink down to an inch in size. Observe!”

Pressing the gem of the ring on your finger, you rapidly dwindle in scale, much to the surprise of the teacher. Once you’re good and shrunken, she lowers a hand for you to walk onto, before raising you to eye level.

“Fascinating!” Ms. Goldfinger remarks. “But what do you plan to use this device for?”

Your face reddens slightly. “Well...I had hoped to explore the human body from the inside...”

Ms. Goldfinger stares almost blankly in response. She admires your curiosity about anatomy, but at the same time, what if her body endangers you in some way?

Sighing, the redhead says...
14.title: Shrunken Field Trip?

choices: Kaede Maple, the infamous rock guitarist, aged 18+
Keliare, the shopping lady with shimmering white hair, aged 19
Seraphine Newt, the lady with olive skin and black hair, 36
Steph Tsunade, the ill lady with purple glasses, mid 30's
Misako the police-officer with golden eyes and a samurai sword, early 20's
15.content:
You look around the streets before you spot a huge crowd of screaming ladies at a rock concert hosted by the one and only Kaede Maple on world tour, you glance at the makeshift stage where the rock-guitarist would be singing loudly into a microphone, along with her backsinger Kayo Regalis.

A white-haired lady called Keliare glanced in your direction before a tawny lady called Seraphine would glare in your direction. Misako also seems to be watching the concert in utter boredom while staring at her watch, meanwhile Steph Tsunade would be complaing of a stomach-ache in the background.

You can choose between all of them:
15.title: Other characters

154.content:
Ultimately, you choose to go inside the body of Steph Tsunade, the slightly-chubby lady with purple glasses, dark hair, and olive skin. She does seem to be suffering from a stomachache...perhaps you could help her out from within her belly?

But it quickly occurs to you that there are other ways to enter Steph’s body. Maybe you could sneak into her ear and check out her brain? Or you could slip into her nose and explore her lungs...

Using your special ring to shrink back down, you decide to get inside Steph through her...
154.title: Steph Tsunade

1541.content:
Seeing Steph Tsunade just sitting there with long black hair and purple glasses, while sipping on some hot green matcha-tea in a clear glass, gives you an idea of some sort... Considering that you'd need to get closer to her, without anyone noticing, and since Steph was awaiting a meal to go with that matcha tea, it was pretty much a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for once! So no one would notice as a tiny speck flies out and hits the ocean of matcha-tea with a tiny splash...

"Oh, that music's pretty nice, but I've heard better," Steph says softly while sipping casually on her matcha tea, you would note at the high arch of her enormous maw and the fact that Steph has no tonsils, that it was a rather strange sight. You'd have several options here, each of them equally valid.
1541.title: Takin' a deep dive

15412.content: You decide to go down the oesophagus of Steph Tsunade, who seems rather calm as you observe where Steph's food goes, as you gaze upon the depths of this human's innards, almost at once you hear an instinctive gurgle echoing from the organic tunnel below you, but you have a choice of either staying here in this area or moving on to the next part of your own journey. Dare you visit Steph's awaiting stomach, or not?
15412.title: Go down Steph's throat

choices: Try your luck with the acid (Digestion route)
Try climbing up Steph’s throat (Escape route)
Look for the entrance to the intestines (Deep endo)
154121.content:
Following the giantess’s sip of tea down her esophagus, you feel yourself get lightly squeezed as you slide down the tight tube of flesh. In a matter of seconds, you land with a wet plop within the stomach of Steph Tsunade.

Despite the lack of light inside Steph’s belly, you’re able to see the organic walls pulsating steadily, as well as a bubbling, green sea of acid near the soft, squishy shore you had landed on. Within that corrosive ocean are the masticated remnants of various food items, slowly dissolving into nutrients.

You’re understandably excited - no other human being has ever attempted self-shrinkage, let alone travelling inside another human’s body! This journey will make history...given that you make it out of here alive. Admittedly, you didn’t really plan very far ahead in your eagerness to explore Steph’s tummy.

How exactly are you going to get out?
154121.title: To the stomach!

choices: Try to survive Steph's digestion (digestion route/intestines)
1541211.content:
As you watch Steph's realistic stomach churn eagerly, you notice that it looks like pretty much an average stomach except that it is noisier than usual and much more hardworking. The red-pink walls start to froth eagerly with lots of leftover bile as you watch Nutella crumpets slide into the potent mixture. Was it just you, or could you hear actual gurgles and onomatopoiea from the borgymus that was truly Steph's belly? You could try to either live (or digest) peacefully in there?

"Welcome to the belly of the babe" indeed... You look downwards and see a new passageway to Steph's small and large intestines, as well as her gallbladder, liver and appendix. Or you can try to survive her intestines and try to take the path of Steph's food... Which will it be?
1541211.title: Steph's newest meal (Digestion route)

1543.content: You would enter Steph's left nostril rather slowly as the air goes in and out of the hairy cavern, you would see some piles of mucus in the right nostril pass you by. Loud gulps of matcha tea draining would be heard gurgling beneath your feet, the 'ground' feels sticky with Steph's body-warmth as you crawl along the olive passageways towards your current destination. Suddenly there is a steep incline awaiting you as you meet the end of Steph's nose and the beginnings of Steph's noisy oesophagus. You can head to the brain, the diaphragm or the awaiting oesophagus!
1543.title: Steph's nose

choices: Stick with Misako the police officer.
155.content:
You consider choosing to explore the body of Misako, but then a thought crosses your mind.

Is exploring a police officer’s body really a good idea?

Yeah, she’s clearly bored out of her mind and exploring her body could potentially bring her out of her funk, and no, you don’t necessarily have to make your presence around her known, but that doesn’t change the fact that you’d be disturbing an officer on duty.

Even if you did go inside of her body with her unaware, you have to also consider the potential repercussions of her finding out that you’re inside of her body. What would happen then? Would you be fined? Would you be put under arrest?

Moral implications aside, there are still several more ladies that could be used for your “Inner-Body” experiment, within this town aside from Misako and the other previously mentioned ladies.

What to do, stay with Misako, or choose someone else? Hmmm....

[Note: This chapter was made because the previous one didn’t have an ‘Other characters’ choice. If you choose to stick with Misako, then please feel free to pretend that this chapter doesn’t exist, if doing so would make it easier to create a starting chapter for her route.]
155.title: Police Line Do Not Cross

choices: Enter a video game character’s body
1552.content: Perhaps with your vast scientific knowledge, you could find a way to enter the world of a game or anime with your Shrink Ring?
1552.title: Fantasy to reality?

info.brief_description: Shrink to an inch in size and explore the insides of people you know.
info.description:
(Original story was created by Darksword, but has since vanished from this site)

Welcome to this reboot of “a Endosomatophilia World”! To put the story in simple terms, you discover a way to shrink down to an inch tall for the sole purpose of exploring the human body from the inside.

Rules:

1. No interaction with male giants or animals.
2. No evil giantesses. Playful/teasing giantesses are fine.
3. Please use good grammar and proper punctuation.
4. Each chapter should be at least a paragraph, except for minor choices. Don’t go crazy with choice chapters, though.
5. The main character can only be killed through digestion.
6. No characters under the age of 18.
7. No explicitly sexual content with family members.

I reserve the right to make adjustments to these rules as needed, as well as delete chapters that greatly violate the rules.

Other than that...enjoy!
